ogTitle: Macfarlane vs Machans Beach: Climate Safety

heading: Macfarlane vs Machans Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Macfarlane, Queensland and Machans Beach, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Macfarlane has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Machans Beach (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Macfarlane or Machans Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Macfarlane has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Machans Beach scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Macfarlane scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Machans Beach scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Macfarlane or Machans Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Macfarlane has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
